---
title: "Partisan Differences in Health Behaviors During the COVID-19 Pandemic"
author: "Christopher Soria"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Introduction

# Methods

# Results

## Partisan Differences in Behaviors and Perceptions of Pandemic Severity

## Geographic Variation in Partisan Behaviors and Perceptions

## Variation Over Time and as a Response to Incidence and Mortality Rates

# Discussion

# Conclusion

# References
